brief_summary_anonymized: Energy major audio campaign — needs to differentiate in radio-saturated commute hours.
strategic_insight: Radio is the medium of accompaniment, not interruption. The brand should be the voice you'd want with you during the commute, not the voice that breaks your music.
execution_summary: Conversational tone. Storytelling rather than promotional. Saudi voices, Saudi-context anecdotes about energy. The brand earns the slot by being interesting.
what_made_it_work: Storytelling outperforms promotional in audio-only format
Saudi voices outperform pan-Arab voices for KSA radio audience
what_would_NOT_transplant: Requires brand willing to invest in storytelling vs message-density
Wrong fit for promotional / urgency-led campaigns
